title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
